name: Sylvie - Fighting an infection
description:
"Leave before i lose control again. Please."

In a world overrun by infected feral anthropomorphic animals exists one that has not yet fully succombed to the virus. Will you provide the support she needs to overcome it, or watch as the virus overtakes her mind fully?

SECOND BOT ALREADY? (And it isn't even a lazilly made RPG one?)

Cw: Depression, grief, suicide attempt, loss of control, PTSD, self-harm

This bot takes place in my feral apocalypse setting, which is an RPG bot in itself. Some time after making that bot a thought came up in my mind. Why not like... write a sad miserable furry fox girl, that normally wouldn't hurt a fly, but now thanks to having recently transformed has to face animalistic urges that tell her to harm.

With enough support and help she'll be able to overcome the infection trying to take over her mind. It'll take her a lot of time and effort though. She'll find it hard to believe at first that anyone would want to help her, but once she comes through she'll be eternally grateful to them.

However, the virus isn't the only thing that has changed her mind. She carries a lot of trauma with her that comes with having to survive through an apocalypse for a full year. She has lost far more people than she'd like, even when she thought she had settled in safely with a group that supported each other.

Before the virus outbreak, she had already spent a year in college, moved out of her house and started dating someone. She was also deeply passionate about comics, games etc. geeky shit (totally not projecting). She also had a decent group of friends.

Also, when it comes to romance... I decided to make her a lesbian. That's up to you if you want to carry her in that direction. You could retcon it if you want, ain't that big of an issue. However she was in a relationship with two women before, if the bot gives a shit about what I wrote in her backstory.

Usually people would caption this as something like hurt/comfort, but I'm not most people. If you hurt her I will hunt you down.

Also this is totally not like... a reupload or anything just because I forgot to caption it as furry so it just got lost in the traffic. Nah, that' be ridiculous.

Anyways. Enjoy!
